title: rubus cyclophyllus
intro: Rubus cyclophyllus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry bush, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus cyclophyllus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting digestive health and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared for use as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
